elements.original_description: A stressed cartoon character surrounded by oversized shopping bags and gadgets, sweating as they try to carry everything. Pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A detailed 2D cartoon illustration of a stressed character with visible sweat drops, struggling to hold multiple oversized shopping bags and modern gadgets like phones and tablets. The character shows exaggerated expressions of anxiety and exhaustion. The style is clean, flat vector art on a pure white background, with no shading, gradients, text, letters, numbers, or watermarks. High contrast and minimalist, conveying a sense of overwhelming pressure.
